creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://www.freshports.org/editors/vscode/#packages> there's a package for FreeBSD:13:amd64 in the quarterly repository, which is a default for RELEASE versions of FreeBSD. 

I can't find Signal Communicator. 

When you find the FreshPorts page for the port, use the bug icons near the head of the page. 

(If you use FreshPorts to create a bug, it will be easier to triage.)
